# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Iconimate is distributed from the `main` branch and the published registry.
Security fixes are applied to the latest release only. Please make sure you are
using the current version before reporting an issue.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, report them privately in one of these ways:

1. Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting on this repository, under the
   Security tab, by choosing "Report a vulnerability".
2. Or email the maintainer at syed.m.ammar@hotmail.com.

When you report, please include as much of the following as you can:

- A description of the vulnerability and its impact
- Steps to reproduce, or a proof of concept
- The affected version, browser, or environment
- Any suggested fix or mitigation, if you have one

## What to expect

- We will acknowledge your report within 5 business days.
- We will investigate and keep you informed of progress.
- Once a fix is ready, we will release it and credit you, unless you prefer to
  remain anonymous.

Thank you for helping keep Iconimate and its users safe.
